description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex surrounded by a tall green hedge, featuring multiple interconnected flat-roofed structures. The property includes a spacious outdoor swimming pool, a tennis court, and landscaped gardens with trees and shrubs. The main buildings are composed of clean, rectangular forms with large windows and open courtyards, emphasizing a minimalist architectural style. There are several outdoor living areas, including patios and covered walkways, providing seamless transitions between indoor and outdoor spaces. The materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and wood, with extensive use of white and neutral tones. The overall layout is expansive and luxurious, designed for both privacy and recreation.
description: A sprawling modern house complex with flat roofs, large windows, a pool, tennis court, and landscaped gardens, enclosed by a green hedge. The design features clean lines, open courtyards, and multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: From this view, the tennis court and swimming pool are prominent, with the main house structures and green hedge enclosure clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the pool area, central courtyard, and the arrangement of the main buildings, with the tennis court in the foreground.
description_view_2: Here, the focus is on the rear of the property, showing the open courtyards, multiple building sections, and the extensive landscaping.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the entry side of the house, with the driveway, main entryway, and the separation between the main and auxiliary buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat-roofed overhang, large glass doors, and a paved approach with minimal decorative elements.
